languages.text: "Разберитесь сами. И еще раз оторвете меня от дел из-за таких пустяков — я прикажу подвесить вас обоих над входом в Сектор Бионика за пальцы рук. Это ясно?"
"Sort it out among yourselves. And if you interrupt me again for such trivialities, I will have both of you strung up by your thumbs at the entrance to the Sector Bionica. Understood?"
languages.original_text: "Разберитесь сами. И еще раз оторвете меня от дел из-за таких пустяков — я прикажу подвесить вас обоих над входом в Сектор Бионика за пальцы рук. Это ясно?"

traits.locale_text: "Sort it out among yourselves. And if you interrupt me again for such trivialities, I will have both of you strung up by your thumbs at the entrance to the Sector Bionica. Understood?"
"Sort it out among yourselves. And if you interrupt me again for such trivialities, I will have both of you strung up by your thumbs at the entrance to the Sector Bionica. Understood?"
"Sort it out among yourselves. And if you interrupt me again for such trivialities, I will have both of you strung up by your thumbs at the entrance to the Sector Bionica. Understood?"

languages.text: «Arréglenlo entre ustedes. Y si vuelven a molestarme por estas tonterías, les haré colgar por los pulgares a la entrada del Sector Bionica. ¿Entendido?».
languages.original_text: "Sort it out among yourselves. And if you interrupt me again for such trivialities, I will have both of you strung up by your thumbs at the entrance to the Sector Bionica. Understood?"

traits.locale_text: «Arréglenlo entre ustedes. Y si vuelven a molestarme por estas tonterías, les haré colgar por los pulgares a la entrada del Sector Bionica. ¿Entendido?».

languages.text: “你们自己解决。要是再拿这些琐事来叨扰我，我就把你们俩双双吊在仿生区的大门口，吊起拇指示众。听明白了吗？”
languages.original_text: "Sort it out among yourselves. And if you interrupt me again for such trivialities, I will have both of you strung up by your thumbs at the entrance to the Sector Bionica. Understood?"

traits.locale_text: “你们自己解决。要是再拿这些琐事来叨扰我，我就把你们俩双双吊在仿生区的大门口，吊起拇指示众。听明白了吗？”

languages.text: « Réglez vos querelles entre vous. Et si vous m’interrompez encore pour de telles trivialités, je vous ferai pendre par les pouces à l’entrée du secteur Bionica. C'est compris ? »
languages.original_text: "Sort it out among yourselves. And if you interrupt me again for such trivialities, I will have both of you strung up by your thumbs at the entrance to the Sector Bionica. Understood?"

traits.locale_text: « Réglez vos querelles entre vous. Et si vous m’interrompez encore pour de telles trivialités, je vous ferai pendre par les pouces à l’entrée du secteur Bionica. C'est compris ? »

languages.text: "Kendi aranızda halledin. Eğer böyle önemsiz şeyler için sözümü bir kez daha keserseniz ikinizi de Sektör Biyonika'nın girişine baş parmaklarınızdan astırırım. Anlaşıldı mı?"
languages.original_text: "Sort it out among yourselves. And if you interrupt me again for such trivialities, I will have both of you strung up by your thumbs at the entrance to the Sector Bionica. Understood?"

traits.locale_text: "Kendi aranızda halledin. Eğer böyle önemsiz şeyler için sözümü bir kez daha keserseniz ikinizi de Sektör Biyonika'nın girişine baş parmaklarınızdan astırırım. Anlaşıldı mı?"

languages.text: "Klärt das untereinander. Und falls Ihr mich noch einmal wegen derartiger Trivialitäten stört, lasse ich Euch beide an Euren Daumen am Zugang zum Sektor Bionica aufhängen. Verstanden?"
languages.original_text: "Sort it out among yourselves. And if you interrupt me again for such trivialities, I will have both of you strung up by your thumbs at the entrance to the Sector Bionica. Understood?"

traits.locale_text: "Klärt das untereinander. Und falls Ihr mich noch einmal wegen derartiger Trivialitäten stört, lasse ich Euch beide an Euren Daumen am Zugang zum Sektor Bionica aufhängen. Verstanden?"

languages.text: 「お前たちで解決しろ。そして、こんな些細なことでまた俺に割り込みたければ、お前たちを両手首で縛って、バイオニカ・セクターの入り口に吊るす。分かったか？」
languages.original_text: "Sort it out among yourselves. And if you interrupt me again for such trivialities, I will have both of you strung up by your thumbs at the entrance to the Sector Bionica. Understood?"

traits.locale_text: 「お前たちで解決しろ。そして、こんな些細なことでまた俺に割り込みたければ、お前たちを両手首で縛って、バイオニカ・セクターの入り口に吊るす。分かったか？」
